CONTENT.Career: Dotor started his career with the academy of Spanish side Rayo Majadahonda before joining La Fábrica at Real Madrid in 2015.On 20 July 2023, La Liga side RC Celta de Vigo announced the signing of Dotor on a five-year contract. He made his professional – and top tier – debut on 19 August, playing the last six minutes of a 1–1 away draw against Real Sociedad.On 21 July 2024, Dotor was loaned to Real Oviedo in Segunda División for the season.
CONTENT.Honours: Real Madrid Juvenil AUEFA Youth League: 2019–20
CONTENT.External links: Real Madrid profileCarlos Dotor at BDFutbolCarlos Dotor at LaPreferente.com (in Spanish)Carlos Dotor at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Carlos Dotor González (born 15 March 2001) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Segunda División club Real Oviedo, on loan from RC Celta de Vigo.
